microsoft_ft: Embedded across enterprise client engagements (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp) to deliver **end-to-end resilience validation**, scaling a 2-person operation into a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ business impact**.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining requirements and self-service scheduling workflows that reduced operational toil by 30% and shifted execution to a scalable, client-ready delivery model.

Directed **14 cross-org production recovery executions** under executive visibility—including a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ contract—serving as primary technical interface between internal engineering and client delivery teams.
Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing deployment capacity by 21% across distributed cloud infrastructure engagements.

Pioneered Azure's first rack-level proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a production-ready drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** and surfacing critical hardware defects that informed platform-wide improvements.

Facilitated 11+ structured discovery interviews with Azure engineers to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing the **product roadmap** to prioritize intent-based YAML generation for distributed cloud environments.

Improved **data retrieval and system reliability** by enforcing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search platform, reducing engineer lookup time by 83% across internal tooling.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework, **accelerating region launches by 28%** and generating $3M in revenue by removing blockers across distributed engineering and operations stakeholders.

Led technical discovery with 20+ service teams to map **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built a phased roadmap to automate critical deployment paths—directly informing infrastructure investment decisions.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership actionable visibility into automation gaps and enabling data-driven prioritization of high-impact cloud deployment improvements.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **legacy OS migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit robotics fleet, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime during pilot transition—demonstrating end-to-end production delivery ownership.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% across distributed embedded systems.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and owned backlog prioritization, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and unblock production deployments on a critical infrastructure rollout.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end client scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a CRM system that streamlined technical delivery handoffs and improved client-facing accuracy.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% through a data-driven go-to-market strategy, optimizing digital channels and translating client feedback into iterative product improvements.

Conducted financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering actionable pricing model recommendations that improved operational rigor and informed leadership's delivery planning.

Inserted 'CI/CD pipelines' and 'distributed embedded systems' in amazon_robotics bullet 2 to mirror JD systems literacy requirements (Kubernetes, distributed systems, container orchestration).
